title: Mugget's Standing Pig
description: Makes pigs stand on two legs | Animated Model :D
body:
### A spin-off of my older Standing Cow resource pack, here is my standing Pig!

Credit to [@EddieBaledy](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/eddiebaledy/) for the suggestion of making a pig man pack [here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/standing-cow-optifine/comment/10635960/#reply_10635960)! (sorry it took so long :D)

I have animated the model to have a rather cool walk animation which I am pretty proud of, so I hope you enjoy it too!

This pack simply remodels the original pig model and nothing else, meaning it can work with almost any other resource pack assuming it doesn't change the model. It uses the CEM method, which **requires** the _**EMF and ETF**_ mods or _**OptiFine**_ to work properly

**Bon Appetit!**
